Source: Player's Handbook

7th-level conjuration

Casting Time: 1 action
Range: 10 feet
Components: V
Duration: Instantaneous

This spell instantly transports you to a destination you select. Familiarity matters:

  • Permanent circle always works.
  • Associated object always works.
FamiliarityMishapOn Target
Permanent circle—01-100
Very familiar01-0525-100

Spell Lists. Wizard
